title: Async Context Manager with Resource Pool
description: Implement an async context manager that manages a pool of database connections with automatic cleanup and connection limiting.
requirements: Implement acquire() returning connection from pool
Implement release(conn) returning connection to pool
Block acquire() when pool exhausted (with timeout)
Implement close() to cleanup all connections

few_shot_examples.code:
class AsyncResource:
    async def __aenter__(self):
        await self.connect()
        return self
    
    async def __aexit__(self, exc_type, exc_val, exc_tb):
        await self.disconnect()
        return False
